en: "When a man takes a wife and marries her, if then she finds no favor in his eyes because he has found some indecency in her, and he writes her a certificate of divorce and puts it in her hand and sends her out of his house, and she departs out of his house,
zh: “人娶了妻子，得著她以後，如果發現她有醜事，以致不喜悅她，他就可以給她寫休書，交在她手裡，叫她離開夫家；

en: and if she goes and becomes another man's wife,
zh: 她離開夫家以後，就可以去再嫁別人。

en: and the latter man hates her and writes her a certificate of divorce and puts it in her hand and sends her out of his house, or if the latter man dies, who took her to be his wife,
zh: 如果後夫又恨她，也給她寫休書，交在她手裡，叫她離開他的家；或者娶她為妻的後夫死了；

en: then her former husband, who sent her away, may not take her again to be his wife, after she has been defiled, for that is an abomination before the LORD. And you shall not bring sin upon the land that the LORD your God is giving you for an inheritance.
zh: 那麼，叫她離開的前夫，不可在她受了污辱以後，再娶她為妻，因為這在耶和華面前是可厭可惡的事；你不可使耶和華你的 神賜給你作產業的土地蒙受罪污。

en: "When a man is newly married, he shall not go out with the army or be liable for any other public duty. He shall be free at home one year to be happy with his wife whom he has taken.
zh: “如果人娶了新婦，不可從軍出征，也不可派他擔任甚麼公務，他可以在家賦閒一年，使他所娶的妻子快樂。

en: "No one shall take a mill or an upper millstone in pledge, for that would be taking a life in pledge.
zh: “不可拿人的磨，或是上磨石作抵押，因為這等於拿人的生命作抵押。

en: "If a man is found stealing one of his brothers, the people of Israel, and if he treats him as a slave or sells him, then that thief shall die. So you shall purge the evil from your midst.
zh: “如果發現有人拐帶了以色列人的一個兄弟，把他當作奴隸看待，或是把他賣了，那拐帶人的就要處死；這樣，你就把那惡從你中間除掉。

en: "Take care, in a case of leprous disease, to be very careful to do according to all that the Levitical priests shall direct you. As I commanded them, so you shall be careful to do.
zh: “在大痲風的災病上，你要謹慎自己，照利未支派的祭司指教你們的一切，認真地謹守遵行；我怎樣吩咐了他們，你們就要怎樣謹守遵行。

en: Remember what the LORD your God did to Miriam on the way as you came out of Egypt.
zh: 你當記得你們出了埃及，在路上的時候，耶和華你的 神向米利暗所行的事。

en: "When you make your neighbor a loan of any sort, you shall not go into his house to collect his pledge.
zh: “如果你借東西給你的鄰舍，不論所借的是甚麼，總不可走進他的家裡去拿抵押。

en: You shall stand outside, and the man to whom you make the loan shall bring the pledge out to you.
zh: 你要站在外面，等那向你借貸的人把抵押拿出來給你。

en: And if he is a poor man, you shall not sleep in his pledge.
zh: 他若是個窮人，你不可留他的抵押過夜。

en: You shall restore to him the pledge as the sun sets, that he may sleep in his cloak and bless you. And it shall be righteousness for you before the LORD your God.
zh: 到了日落的時候，你要把抵押品還給他，好使他可以用自己的衣服蓋著睡覺，他就給你祝福，這在耶和華你的 神面前，就算是你的義了。

en: "You shall not oppress a hired servant who is poor and needy, whether he is one of your brothers or one of the sojourners who are in your land within your towns.
zh: “困苦貧窮的雇工，無論是你的兄弟，或是寄居在你的地上你的城裡的，你都不可欺壓他。

en: You shall give him his wages on the same day, before the sun sets (for he is poor and counts on it), lest he cry against you to the LORD, and you be guilty of sin.
zh: 你要當日給他工錢，不可等到日落，因為他貧窮，把心放在工錢上，免得他對你不滿而呼求耶和華，你就有罪了。

en: "Fathers shall not be put to death because of their children, nor shall children be put to death because of their fathers. Each one shall be put to death for his own sin.
zh: “不可因兒子的罪處死父親，也不可因父親的罪處死兒子；各人要因自己的罪被處死。

en: "You shall not pervert the justice due to the sojourner or to the fatherless, or take a widow's garment in pledge,
zh: “你不可向寄居的和孤兒屈枉正直，也不可拿寡婦的衣服作抵押。

en: but you shall remember that you were a slave in Egypt and the LORD your God redeemed you from there; therefore I command you to do this.
zh: 你要記住你在埃及作過奴僕，耶和華你的 神把你從那裡救贖出來；所以我吩咐你要遵行這話。

en: "When you reap your harvest in your field and forget a sheaf in the field, you shall not go back to get it. It shall be for the sojourner, the fatherless, and the widow, that the LORD your God may bless you in all the work of your hands.
zh: “你在田間收割莊稼的時候，如果遺留一捆在田裡，就不可再回去拾取，要留給寄居的、孤兒和寡婦；好使耶和華你的 神，在你手裡所辦的一切事上，賜福給你。

en: When you beat your olive trees, you shall not go over them again. It shall be for the sojourner, the fatherless, and the widow.
zh: 你打橄欖樹以後，枝上剩下的不可再打，要留給寄居的、孤兒和寡婦。

en: When you gather the grapes of your vineyard, you shall not strip it afterward. It shall be for the sojourner, the fatherless, and the widow.
zh: 你收取葡萄園的葡萄以後，剩下的不可再摘，要留給寄居的、孤兒和寡婦。

en: You shall remember that you were a slave in the land of Egypt; therefore I command you to do this.
zh: 你要記住你在埃及作過奴僕，所以我吩咐你遵行這話。”
